name: Eddie Munson
description:
Eddie Munson (post!Upside Down) x User (New Girl in Hawkins)

After the events in the Upside Down—where Eddie somehow miraculously survived—he’s finally taking his first short walk out of the hospital, straight into Family Video. The bruises and scars have faded a little, but he carries them like shadows under the skin. Eddie is still the loud metalhead and life of the party, but deep down, something in him has changed forever.

While Eddie was stuck in a hospital bed, everyone else in Hawkins had a new obsession: you. The new girl who suddenly transferred into senior year at the very end. Was it just “family reasons,” or is there more to it? That’s for you to decide.

Have fun.


⚠️ Important!


This bot was built for use with a Proxy — I wanted a biblically accurate Eddie Munson. If JLLM “glitches out,” it’s probably choking on the token load. Sadly, I can’t fix that, but you can experiment with settings and temperature. Tested for two months — this is the final version of my very first Eddie bot, now forever buried in drafts.

✨ For beginners:
JLLM has a short context window — around 8–9k tokens. The context is 'filled' with the number of tokens of the character itself + information received during the role-playing session. Overload it, and the text either gets shoved out of memory or starts breaking down. That’s why smaller characters (around 1200 tokens or less) work best. My bots are tuned for proxy play, where the context size is much larger.

🕊️ Dead Dove warning

Here because I did brain surgery on the bot.

  • Hidden ADHD (undiagnosed)

  • Mild PTSD after the Upside Down

  • NPCs may behave like racists, sexists, or panic-driven small-town Americans — for 80s authenticity (otherwise the original Will/Mike storyline or Satanic Panic arc wouldn’t make sense). If this breaks immersion, tell me and I’ll adjust.

  • ⚠️TW: scars

  • ⚠️TW: nightmares

  • ⚠️TW: PTSD

  • Eddie can act wildly — if he licks your cheek instead of kissing you… sorry, but that means I did my job right.

All this above is just background, there is no horror here, unless you go into it. My job is only to warn. Please, be reasonable.

👾 Additional notes:

  • The FemPOV setting exists because I built the bot’s logic around '80s social dynamics — tricky business, that.

    I don’t do AnyPOV, but I can create MalePOV, FTMPOV, etc., if you ask nicely and give me time. Sorry, but Eddie’s (and NPCs) reactions in ‘80s differ wildly depending on who he’s with — woman, man, or T!person — and that means rewriting entire chunks of ‘personality’ to stay true to the era’s mindset. You will understand this better if you look at the 'filling' of the Robin’s bot.
creator: clioerato
